key_items: Bitcoin holds $77K as stocks rally with bulls targeting $82K
Bitcoin and Ethereum ETF outflows accelerate with $2.7B rotation into altcoins
Trump Media transfers 2,650 BTC (~$205M) to Crypto.com, signaling potential selling pressure
reasoning: Bitcoin shows mixed signals with near-term range support at $77-78K and potential rally targets to $80-82K, but institutional money is rotating away from BTC/ETH into altcoins and notable holders (Trump Media, Mark Cuban) are liquidating positions. The macro backdrop (stock rally, cooling tensions) supports bullish technicals, but on-chain data reveals rising exchange inflows and outflows from major ETFs suggest weakening institutional demand over the 1-7 day swing window.
risks: Significant selling pressure from Trump Media's $205M BTC transfer to Crypto.com, combined with 10-day Binance inflow streak, could break below $77K support if broader market sentiment deteriorates.
